When Mars is defeated by Jupiter, the Bahlikas, marching
kings and persons living by fire (such as goldsmiths, cooks etc.)
will come to grief. When he is vanquished by Mercury, the Snra«
senas, KaliAgas and ^alvas will suffer. When he is defeated by
Saturn, kings defending a town will become victorious, but the
subjects will be harmed. When he is defeated by Venus, granaries,
Mlecchas and Ksatriyas will suffer.
'jTrtfMsfir:
5WT i
f ^ i
When Mercury is defeated by Mars, trees, rivers, ascetics, the
Asmakas, kings, people living in the north and sacrificers will
come to grief. When he is conquered by Jupiter, the Mlecchas,
Sudras, thieves, wealthy men, citizens (defenders of towns), Trai-
gartas and mountain-dwellers will be affected, and there will be an
earthquake. When he is vanquished by Saturn, sailors, warriors,
aquatic products, rich persons and pregnant women will suffer.
When he is ovtrpowered by Venus, there will be destruction by fire
